self_review_rows.finding: All COMSOL Gate2B support files are registered with external path, source SHA, row_count, and mirror SHA.
2 NODI parent ledger rows map to 80 COMSOL support rows; child rows remain artifact-level only.
W800/D900/300 exact PRS grains are present for both views; 220, D1200/300, and edge4-to-edge20 remain blocked/review-only.
No q_ch weighting, chi_selected, JRC, winner, yield, detection, wet pass, clogging, runtime, or production promotion is emitted.
self_review_rows.focus: forbidden claim leakage and gate logic
